author: Domekologe
name: PDC_Redbot_Game_Cogs
short: Game-specific cogs (World of Warcraft, Trivia) for Red-DiscordBot by Domekologe.
description: Game-specific cogs for Red-DiscordBot, focused on World of Warcraft (Warcraft Logs, WoW Tools, token tracker, guild automation, watchlist) and a trivia game. General-purpose cogs live in the separate PDC_Redbot_Cogs repo.
install_msg:
Thanks for adding the PDC_Redbot_Game_Cogs repo!

Browse cogs with `[p]cog list <repo>` and install one with `[p]cog install <repo> <cog>`.
